motion_budget.background_motion_policy: slow push / parallax / focus pull / light sweep / none
motion_budget.anti_ppt_policy: motion must reveal, transform, bridge, or direct attention; avoid repeated opacity+y entrances

kinetic_text_relay.relay_rules: Each outgoing keyword hands attention to the incoming keyword through an action object, mask, line, cursor, scan, crop, direction, or camera move.
kinetic_text_relay.fade_policy: Fade is support only; if fade is the main transition, document why stillness is the concept.

css3_layers.role: clip-path / mask / perspective / blend / filter / CSS variable carrier
css3_layers.purpose: Give text or scene transition a structural reveal instead of a generic fade.

svg_layers.role: path / mask / underline / connector / logo lockup
svg_layers.purpose: Create a visible bridge between beats.

kinetic_typography.entry: clip reveal / scan reveal / split-line reveal / word assembly
kinetic_typography.exit: exits through bridge, mask, or subject movement
kinetic_typography.bridge: outgoing scan/path/light becomes next scene transition

beats.label: metaphor-rim-light-reveal
beats.text_transition_device: mask / scan / split / compression / assembly / handoff / deliberate stillness
beats.bridge_element: scan line / SVG path / mask / camera move / text baseline / light sweep
beats.purpose: Reveal the central metaphor with cinematic restraint.

beats.label: background-camera-drift
beats.not_opacity_y_only_evidence: camera transform changes spatial depth instead of only fading text
beats.purpose: Give the stage depth without stealing attention from text.

beats.label: title-lockup

text_transition.exit: keyword hands off to transition device
text_transition.bridge: mask or scan becomes next beat connector

kinetic_relay.relay_handoff: mask or scan becomes next beat connector

beats.not_opacity_y_only_evidence: clip-path or mask changes the word reveal; opacity is only secondary
beats.what_changes_if_motion_removed: the hook becomes a static title card
beats.purpose: Let the amplified keyword land after the symbol is understood.

beats.label: tension-to-proof-transition

text_transition.lock: transition midpoint remains legible or intentionally text-free
text_transition.bridge: same bridge element introduces next beat

kinetic_relay.action_object: scan line / SVG path / mask / light sweep
kinetic_relay.relay_handoff: same bridge element introduces next beat

beats.bridge_element: rim-light dissolve / mask wipe / directed cut
beats.not_opacity_y_only_evidence: shared mask/path/light carries the scene change
beats.what_changes_if_motion_removed: the edit becomes an empty fade between slides
beats.purpose: Move from metaphor tension into proof without an empty fade.

holds.reason: Give the viewer time to read the metaphor as a still image.

transitions.mechanism: rim-light dissolve / mask wipe / directed cut
transitions.attention_bridge: shared scan line, SVG path, crop window, text baseline, light direction, or camera move
transitions.risk: Do not transition through an empty black frame.

style_constraints: White, gray, and restrained warm gold only.
No neon cyberpunk, multicolor gradients, icon piles, ecommerce banner layout, or generic tech clutter.
Motion must reveal the metaphor rather than decorate the frame.
Hook and key viewpoint text should own center or upper-center attention when that zone is free from the visual subject.
Avoid static PPT sequencing: repeated centered title cards, repeated fade-up, static wallpaper, and empty black fades.
stability_notes: No Date.now(), unseeded Math.random(), setTimeout, setInterval, requestAnimationFrame as timeline truth, or runtime network asset fetches.
